ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "female" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is female (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "black" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is black (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "latin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is Latin (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is white (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "employed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is employed (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "wage" REAL /* Wage of the individual */,
  "collgrad" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is a college graduate (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "parent_college" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual's parent has a college degree (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "numkids" INTEGER /* Number of children the individual has */,
  "efc" REAL /* Expected Family Contribution (EFC) for financial aid */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual has any disabilities */,
  "military_service" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual has served in the military */,
  "employment_sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the individual is employed */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the individual started their current job */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* Date the individual ended their current job */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual has health insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "female" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is female (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "black" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is black (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "latin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is Latin (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is white (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "parent_college" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual's parent has a college degree (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "numkids" INTEGER /* Number of children the individual has */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual has any disabilities */,
  "military_service" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual has served in the military */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "employed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is employed (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "wage" REAL /* Wage of the individual */,
  "collgrad" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is a college graduate (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "employment_sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the individual is employed */,
  "employment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the individual started their current job */,
  "employment_end_date" TEXT /* Date the individual ended their current job */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the individual */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual has health insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "efc" REAL /* Expected Family Contribution (EFC) for financial aid */,
  "financial_aid_type" TEXT /* Type of financial aid (e.g., grant, scholarship, loan) */,
  "financial_aid_amount" REAL /* Amount of financial aid received */,
  "financial_aid_start_date" TEXT /* Date the financial aid started */,
  "financial_aid_end_date" TEXT /* Date the financial aid ended */,
  "aid_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the financial aid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "collgrad" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual is a college graduate (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "parent_college" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the individual's parent has a college degree (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education completed */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  "gpa" REAL /* GPA of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "numkids" INTEGER /* Number of children the individual has */,
  "spouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the spouse */,
  "spouse_employment_status" INTEGER /* Employment status of the spouse */,
  "spouse_income" REAL /* Income of the spouse */,
  "household_income" REAL /* Total household income */,
  "household_size" INTEGER /* Total number of people in the household */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the record was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the record was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., average wage, employment rate) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistic was calculated */,
  "statistic_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., demographic, employment, financial) */,
  "statistic_description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "statistic_source" TEXT /* Source of the statistic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)
